imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- QRIS payment code card with white background, red accent shapes, QRIS logo top-left, GPN eagle logo top-right, bold text 'DIMSUM OJI', NMID ID1026488874078, label A01, large black QR code center, red footer strip with payment method icons (qris.dim_800x1100.png)

existing_features.title: Replace the existing QRIS payment image in the OrderForm component with the newly uploaded QRIS image (G191285866-0703A01-default.png). Save the image as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/qris.png and update the src reference in OrderForm.tsx to point to this new file.

projectName: Replace QRIS payment image with uploaded image
